packageRules.description: Pin telegraf to 1.39.x: minor and major version bumps require verification that they support the Go version shipped with the current OpenWrt version. Patch updates are allowed automatically.
Pin victoria-metrics to 1.142.x: minor and major version bumps require verification that they support the Go version shipped with the current OpenWrt version. Patch updates are allowed automatically.
Pin victoria-logs to 1.50.x: minor and major version bumps require verification that they support the Go version shipped with the current OpenWrt version. Patch updates are allowed automatically.
